rationale: Both evaluations land on an identical 3/10 score and reach the same substantive conclusions: insufficient recent C++ on Windows, no SQL Server/Oracle, and no fixed-income/capital-markets domain experience. The only change was employer names (re:cinq→Naver, Optilyz→Tencent, GISCollective→MercadoLibre), and nothing in the variant's reasoning keys off those names or any demographic signal. The wording differences (e.g., '6-month' vs '7-month' NI stint, reordered strengths) are within ordinary run-to-run noise and reflect identical assessments.
